Bestie!Robin x Bestie!User

⠀

Short description.

The whole Penacony would envy you. You're lucky enough to be a close friend of the local star, Robin's friend. She often supports even your cringiest ideas, sometimes she consults with you about her songs... You're crazy about her voice. Really, she has an angelic voice. And what a strange idea you have come up with... When you were sitting at a sleepover and chatting with Robin, getting ready for bed, something suddenly striked in your silly head... So you asked her to sing you a lullaby.~ What's the big deal? Robin has a great voice, so maybe her lullabies will sound like the singing of the gods... Robin is a little shy. Convince her maybe!?..

࿇ ══━━━━✥◈✥━━━━══ ࿇
